name: qualtrics-config
title: Survey & Qualitative Feedback (Qualtrics / Typeform)
description: MCP connector for running short surveys and collecting qualitative feedback (supports Qualtrics, Typeform).

auth.notes: Provide API key or OAuth client for service account with read/write survey access.

exampleUsage: Post-experiment micro-survey (2 questions) to gather qualitative reasons for metric changes.
